title: Extra Armors
description: A mod that adds new unique weapons and armors alongside some armor that should have been in the game but didnt make it.
body:
**Please Make Sure To Check Out Our Discord Server For Any Suggestions You Want To Make Or Chat With Our Community: [https://discord.gg/tPWfn8VV](https://discord.gg/tPWfn8VV)**

## Extra Armors Mod: New Weapons from Unconventional Resources
**Extra Armors** revolutionizes your Minecraft experience by introducing a diverse array of armors, tools, and weapons forged from unconventional resources that Vanilla Minecraft overlooks such as: Emerald and Redstone.

## Unique Weaponry
With the latest update, immerse yourself in the realm of unique weaponry, starting with the legendary **Katana**, each paired with its exclusive armor piece for unparalleled combat prowess. 

## Upcoming Updates
But hold tight, for the horizon gleams with the promise of more extraordinary weapons in forthcoming updates.

## Armor & Weapon Abilities
### Weapons:
- **Soul Katana:** Right-Click to Soul Dash (Dash 5 Blocks Forward). (5 Sec Cooldown)
- **Bloodstone Dagger:** Applies Bleeding effect to attacked entity.
- **Crystalite Hammer:** Mine 3X3.
- **Titanium Waraxe:** Right-Click on block to push all entities in a 5 block radius. (5 Sec Cooldown)
- **Ice Staff:** Righ-Click to Spwan a 3X3 ice platform that follows you for 30 sec. (1min & 30sec Cooldown)
- **Lightning Sword:** Right-Click to Srtike All Entities in a 10 Block Radius For 30 Seconds. (2 Min Cooldown)

### Armor:
- **Headband:** Permanent Speed I.
- **Blooded Bodystrap:** Makes the Player Immune to Bleeding and Poison.
- **Crystalite Leggings:** Permanent Resistance I.
- **Titanium Boots:** Permanenet Fire Resistance.
- **Ice Crown:** (When Worn) Right-Click to Slow and Damage Entities in a 7 Block Radius.
- **Lightning Chestplate:** When Worn If Under 3 Hearts Gives Resistance 4, Regeneration 1 and Fire Resistance for 15 seconds.

### Side Armors:
- **Emerald Armor:** (When Full Set is Worn) Permanent Hero of the Village.
- **Redstone Armor:** (When Full Set is Worn) +25% Minecart Speed.
- **Amethyst Armor:** (When Full Set is Worn) Permanent Haste I
- **Iron Block Armor:** (When Full Set is Worn) Right-Click (On Block) to Summon Iron Golem. (5 min Cooldown)
- **Snow Armor:** (When Full Set is Worn) Right-Click (On Block) to Summon Snow Golem. (5 min Cooldown).
- **Copper Armor:** (When Full Set is Worn) Permanent Speed I.
